Home › Programs › Thursday Evening Sitting
Weekly drop-in

Thursday Evening Sitting

Drop-in community meditation

A free weekly drop-in meditation session open to everyone. Thirty minutes of guided meditation followed by a short teaching and informal tea. No booking required — just come.

Open to Everyone

Our Thursday evening sitting is the heart of our community week. It is completely free, requires no booking, and welcomes everyone — whether you have been meditating for decades or are curious for the first time.

Format

  • 6:00pm — Doors open, quiet settling time
  • 6:15pm — Guided meditation (30 minutes)
  • 6:45pm — Short teaching or reading (15 minutes)
  • 7:00pm — Informal tea and conversation

What to Expect

We keep things simple and unhurried. There is no expectation to speak, participate, or share. Come as you are.

A donation bowl is by the door. All donations support our scholarship fund, which helps those who cannot afford our courses attend free of charge.

Course Details

Format
Weekly drop-in
Schedule
Every Thursday 6:00–7:30pm
Duration
90 minutes
Level
All levels
Cost
Free · dana welcome

Register

To register or ask questions, get in touch with us directly.

Contact us to register

Sliding scale and scholarships available for all courses.

Stillwater Dharma Center

A non-sectarian centre for meditation and contemplative practice,
open to all, rooted in kindness.
